sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ يَزِيدُ بَابَ الْمَخْزَنِ مَفْتُوحًا وَهُوَ مُتَأَكِّدٌ أَنَّهُ أَغْلَقَهُ.
sentences.translation: Yazid je pronašao vrata ostave otvorena a bio je siguran da ih je zatvorio.
sentences.translationEn: Yazid found the storage room door open and he was sure he had closed it.

sentences.arabic: دَخَلَ وَرَأَى أَنَّ بَعْضَ الْأَشْيَاءِ تَغَيَّرَتْ أَمَاكِنُهَا.
sentences.translation: Ušao je i vidio da su se neke stvari pomjerile sa svog mjesta.
sentences.translationEn: He went in and saw that some things had changed places.
He asked all the family members.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتِ الْجَدَّةُ: بَحَثْتُ عَنْ خَيْطٍ لِأَخِيطَ بِهِ الثَّوْبَ.
sentences.translation: Baka je rekla: Tražila sam konac da šijem haljinu.
sentences.translationEn: The grandmother said: I was looking for thread to sew a dress.

sentences.arabic: ضَحِكَ يَزِيدُ وَقَالَ: فِي الْمَرَّةِ الْقَادِمَةِ أَخْبِرِينِي يَا جَدَّتِي.
sentences.translation: Yazid se nasmijao i rekao: Sljedeći put mi reci, bako.
sentences.translationEn: Yazid laughed and said: Next time tell me, grandmother.
